_comment: Single source of truth for all frameworks. Add a new entry here + create a folder with index.html at the repo root.

frameworks.title: REWIRED
frameworks.subtitle: Rebuilding belief systems for AI-native operators
frameworks.summary: A framework for rewiring the cognitive defaults that hold operators back from building AI-native businesses. Belief audit → identity reframe → action protocol.

frameworks.title: The Flywheel
frameworks.subtitle: Compounding leverage in AI-native businesses
frameworks.summary: How to architect a self-reinforcing loop where every action compounds the next. The mechanics behind AI-native businesses that scale without linear effort.

frameworks.title: The Rediscovery Canvas
frameworks.subtitle: A diagnostic for finding your edge after a transition
frameworks.summary: A structured canvas for operators in transition — between roles, industries, or identities. Maps assets, edges, and unfair advantages onto a single page.

frameworks.title: TeamScale
frameworks.subtitle: Scaling teams without losing the founding signal
frameworks.summary: An operating model for scaling teams from 5 to 50 without diluting the founding signal. Roles, rituals, and reporting structures that preserve velocity.

frameworks.title: Vibecoding
frameworks.subtitle: Shipping production code with AI as your co-pilot
frameworks.summary: An interactive course for non-engineers shipping real software with AI. From prompt to pull request — the workflow founders actually use.
